LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Contact Card with Avatar Name and Title
LightningComponentBundle.description: A contact card component displaying contact information including avatar, name, title, email, phone number, and action buttons for calling and emailing. Follows SLDS 2 design guidelines for accessibility and responsive design.

property.name: contact
property.label: Contact Data
property.description: JSON string containing contact information (name, title, email, phone, avatarUrl)
